results.title: Nordiska Kök | Scandinavian design kitchens
results.content: # nordiskakok. # Nordiska Kök | Scandinavian design kitchens. Award-Winning, bespoke kitchens in Scandinavian design, crafted in our carpentry studio in Sweden. Discover 4 wooden kitchen combinations, from light oak paired with vibrant marble to deeper wood tones contrasted with stainless steel. All capturing the natural beauty and organic appeal of wood.⁠ ⁠ Discover more of our wooden kitchens on our website. As a fusion of Scandinavian simplicity and the raw beauty of Jämtland’s mountain landscape we have created The Fjället Cabin Kitchen. Discover 5 kitchen countertop ideas, from the timeless beauty of marble to the sleek elegance of stainless steel, or the enduring durability of quartzite.⁠. Top 6 kitchen trends of 2025 👇🏽. results.title: Welcome to Nordiska Kök — Nordiska Kök
results.content: At the meeting, you will go through your thoughts and preferences, and your kitchen designer will guide you through all the choices and possibilities available. You can book your visit through your kitchen designer, and you will then get exclusive access to our showroom during your reserved time. Your kitchen designer adjusts the design sketch and quotation based on your discussions, and if you then want to proceed, you pay a design fee of 7,500 SEK, which will later be deducted from the total cost of the kitchen when ordering. When you feel satisfied with the design of your kitchen and all options have been made, it is time to order the kitchen. Regarding installation, we always recommend that your installer has a review with the responsible kitchen designer at Nordiska Kök. Today, we are proud to offer our Scandinavian design kitchens, built from scratch in our carpentry outside Gothenburg, to customers throughout Europe.
